target_criticism: The paper carries a May 2026 revision with a March 2026 production date and benchmark artifacts generated May 5, 2026, while centering validation on Qwen/Qwen3.6-27B-FP8, challenged as an unestablished or non-real release served on a hash-pinned SGLang nightly image.

completed_artifacts_reviewed.finding: 22 local artifacts present, 3 public receipts OK, public testnet VL sequence 5 decoded, public scoring config verified.
Comparator audit shows exact replay and boundary disagreement versus a deterministic baseline, not model accuracy.
Boundary disagreements are policy tradeoffs under existing fields; no proven model or baseline superiority.

why_repeating_completed_artifacts_adds_n: The existing packets already establish replayability, publication provenance, and the present limit of model-lift evidence. The remaining gap is public citation of the exact model artifact and careful wording of the claim.
safe_replacement_sentence: The active replay profile uses `Qwen/Qwen3.6-27B-FP8`, a public Qwen Hugging Face model card last modified on 2026-04-24 and documented for SGLang serving, under a pinned Modal/SGLang container; this supports reproducible pinned-stack replay, not model-correctness or production authority transfer.
do_not_claim: The Qwen3.6 benchmark proves that AI governance is correct, that the model is the optimal selector, or that replayability across heterogeneous production profiles has been established.
integration_target: One compact citation sentence near the Qwen3.6 replay profile references; no new benchmark section.
